_notes: Template for manually整理真实暗黑核 / d2core BD. Keep valid JSON. Replace TODO or empty arrays with extracted build data.
source_url: TODO: paste the original d2core build URL here
game_version: TODO: fill game version if shown on the page
season: TODO: fill season if shown on the page
class: TODO: fill class name, for example Barbarian, Rogue, Sorcerer, Druid, Necromancer, Spiritborn
build_name: TODO: fill build title from the source page

core_skills._notes: Add one object per active/core skill. role examples: main_damage, mobility, defense, generator, spender, damage_enabler.
core_skills.name: TODO: skill name
core_skills.notes: TODO: explain why this skill is used in the build

passive_skills._notes: Add important passive skills only. Use priority to show importance.
passive_skills.name: TODO: passive skill name
passive_skills.notes: TODO: explain what this passive contributes

gear._notes: Add one object per gear slot shown in the build. required=true means the build strongly depends on it.
gear.slot: TODO: helm / chest / gloves / pants / boots / amulet / ring_1 / ring_2 / weapon etc.
gear.name: TODO: item name or generic slot description

aspects._notes: Add legendary aspects/powers from the build.
aspects.name: TODO: aspect name
aspects.notes: TODO: explain the aspect's function in this build

uniques._notes: Add unique items. Leave required=false for optional upgrades.
uniques.name: TODO: unique item name
uniques.notes: TODO: explain whether this unique is mandatory or optional

affix_priorities._notes: Group affixes by offense, defense, utility, resource, or other useful category.
affix_priorities.notes: TODO: explain why these affixes matter

paragon_boards._notes: Add paragon boards in recommended order if available.
paragon_boards.name: TODO: paragon board name
paragon_boards.purpose: TODO: explain why this board is selected

glyphs._notes: Add glyphs and the board where each glyph is placed if known.
glyphs.name: TODO: glyph name
glyphs.notes: TODO: explain why this glyph is used

legendary_nodes._notes: Add legendary paragon nodes if the build uses them.
legendary_nodes.name: TODO: legendary node name
legendary_nodes.notes: TODO: explain why this legendary node matters

author_notes: TODO: paste or summarize important notes from the source page in your own structured summary

ai_analysis_status._notes: Use missing_fields to track fields that still need manual整理 before real analysis.
ai_analysis_status.notes: TODO: update to ready_for_analysis after replacing TODO values with real build data.
